message:
Close rano v2 epic - all features complete (bd-3o1)

All 10 child features implemented:
- Export to CSV/JSONL (bd-1vz)
- Alert thresholds and watch mode (bd-2iu)
- Config validation command (bd-n2d)
- Smart filtering presets (bd-26d)
- Process ancestry chain display (bd-1ju)
- Session diff between runs (bd-1o5)
- Colorblind-friendly themes (bd-1lq)
- Automatic session naming (bd-q9u)
- Connection retry detection (bd-1i6)
- Shell prompt integration (bd-36b)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,9 +17,9 @@
 {"id":"bd-2xz","title":"Implement session name generation","description":"Deliverables:
- generate_session_name(patterns: &[String], primary_provider: Provider) -> String:
  - time_of_day: night/morning/afternoon/evening
  - provider: anthropic/openai/google/mixed
  - pattern: first pattern or 'default'
  - date: YYYY-MM-DD
  - Format: '{time}-{provider}-{pattern}-{date}'

- CLI: --session-name <name> to override
- Store in sessions table: session_name column
- Report accepts --session <name> as filter (in addition to --run-id)

- Unit tests for name generation logic
- E2E test verifying session name in report output","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:22.010801099Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T03:31:17.816564877Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T03:31:17.816521615Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xz","depends_on_id":"bd-q9u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:22.086836020Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-300","title":"Add config subcommand CLI","description":"Deliverables:
- Add 'config' to Command enum with subcommands:
  - check: validate all config files
  - show: display resolved config
  - paths: show config file locations

- ConfigSubcommand enum:
  - Check
  - Show { json: bool }
  - Paths

- run_config_check():
  1. Find all config files (config.conf, rano.toml, presets)
  2. Run validation on each
  3. Print errors/warnings with file:line context
  4. Exit with appropriate code

- run_config_show(json: bool):
  1. Load all config as if starting monitor
  2. Print resolved key=value (or JSON)
  3. Show source of each value (default, config, cli)

- run_config_paths():
  1. List search paths for each config type
  2. Mark which files exist
  3. Show load order

- Output formatting:
  - Errors: red with ✗ prefix
  - Warnings: yellow with ⚠ prefix
  - Info: normal with → prefix","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:30.990453145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T18:00:29.974960495Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T18:00:29.974891415Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-300","depends_on_id":"bd-52z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:44.515420210Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-300","depends_on_id":"bd-n2d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:31.003915277Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33o","title":"Implement colorblind theme","description":"Deliverables:
- Add Theme::Colorblind variant
- Provider symbols:
  - Anthropic: ● (filled circle)
  - OpenAI: ◆ (diamond)
  - Google: ▲ (triangle)
  - Unknown: ○ (empty circle)

- High-contrast color palette:
  - Anthropic: bright blue
  - OpenAI: orange
  - Google: black (or dark gray on dark bg)
  - Unknown: gray

- Update format_* functions to include symbol when theme=colorblind
- Bar chart patterns: use different fill chars per provider

- Unit tests for symbol mapping
- E2E test verifying symbols in output
- Add --theme colorblind to help text","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:58.460826002Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T03:05:49.434879469Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T03:05:49.434818484Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33o","depends_on_id":"bd-1lq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:58.524640198Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-36b","title":"Shell prompt integration","description":"Purpose:
- Provide one-line status for embedding in shell prompts (PS1, starship)
- Always-visible network status without dedicating a terminal

User impact:
- Prompt shows: '🔵 3 active | anthropic:45 openai:12'
- Instant awareness of AI network activity
- Configurable format for different prompt systems

Features:
- rano status --one-line: output for prompt embedding
- rano status --format <template>: custom format string
- Fast execution (<50ms) for prompt responsiveness
- Read from SQLite or shared state file

Template variables:
- {active}: current active connection count
- {total}: total connections this session
- {anthropic}, {openai}, {google}: per-provider counts
- {last_domain}: most recent domain
- {session_name}: current session name

Default format: '{active} active | anthropic:{anthropic} openai:{openai}'

Implementation:
- Query latest session from SQLite
- Cache results for 1s to avoid repeated queries
- Optional daemon mode for even faster response

Testing:
- Unit tests for template expansion
- E2E script verifying output format
- Benchmark: must complete in <50ms","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:36.403153804Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:36.420956080Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-36b","depends_on_id":"bd-3o1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:36.420930913Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3dy","title":"Implement retry detection logic","description":"Deliverables:
- RetryTracker struct:
  - recent: HashMap<(IpAddr, u16, u32), Vec<Instant>>
  - threshold: usize (default 3)
  - window_ms: u64 (default 60000)

- track_connection(key: &ConnKey, pid: u32) -> Option<RetryWarning>:
  - Add current timestamp to Vec for (ip, port, pid)
  - Prune entries older than window_ms
  - If count >= threshold, return warning

- RetryWarning struct:
  - count: usize
  - window_seconds: f64
  - endpoint: (IpAddr, u16)

- Integration: call after close event detection","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:44.229045587Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:42:52.524153483Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:42:52.524109651Z","close_reason":"Implemented RetryTracker struct with track_connection method as specified. RetryWarning struct with count, window_seconds, and endpoint fields. Includes prune_stale method for memory management. Tests pass, code compiles. Integration into main loop and CLI flags are in dependent bead bd-90z.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3dy","depends_on_id":"bd-1i6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:44.287016248Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3o1","title":"rano v2: alerting, export, UX improvements","description":"Goals:
- Add proactive alerting capabilities for security monitoring
- Enable data export for integration with external tools
- Improve UX with presets, ancestry display, and accessibility
- Reduce friction through config validation and session naming

Context:
- Current rano is observation-only; users must watch output constantly
- SQLite data is locked inside; no easy export to CSV/Pandas/grep
- Config debugging requires trial-and-error runs
- Session IDs are opaque (PID-timestamp) not human-readable

Scope:
- 5 prioritized features with comprehensive tests and documentation
- Each feature is independent but builds on existing infrastructure
- Preserve all existing CLI behavior; improvements are additive

Quality bar:
- Every feature must include unit tests and at least one e2e test script
- E2E scripts must use the existing harness (scripts/e2e/lib.sh)
- Tests must run offline without elevated privileges
- Documentation updates for README and --help text

Acceptance:
- Each child feature has tasks with unit tests + e2e scripts + docs
- All new flags documented in README
- Config validation catches common errors before runtime","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:06.726854553Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:06.726854553Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Acceptance:
- Each child feature has tasks with unit tests + e2e scripts + docs
- All new flags documented in README
- Config validation catches common errors before runtime","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:06.726854553Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T06:36:10.708582229Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T06:36:10.708519481Z","close_reason":"All child features complete: Export (bd-1vz), Alerts (bd-2iu), Config validation (bd-n2d), Presets (bd-26d), Process ancestry (bd-1ju), Session diff (bd-1o5), Colorblind themes (bd-1lq), Session naming (bd-q9u), Retry detection (bd-1i6), Shell prompt integration (bd-36b).","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3t7","title":"Implement preset loading","description":"Deliverables:
- PresetLoader struct:
  - builtin_presets: HashMap<&'static str, &'static str> (name -> content)
  - user_preset_dirs: Vec<PathBuf>

- load_preset(name) -> Result<HashMap<String, String>>:
  1. Check builtin_presets first
  2. Search user_preset_dirs for <name>.conf
  3. Parse as key=value, return HashMap

- Integration with config loading:
  1. Parse --preset flags early
  2. For each preset (in order):
     - Load preset config
     - Merge into base config
  3. Apply remaining CLI flags (override)

- list_presets() -> Vec<PresetInfo>:
  - Scan builtin + user dirs
  - Extract description from first line comment (# Description: ...)
  - Format for --list-presets output

- Built-in preset contents (as static strings):
  - PRESET_AUDIT, PRESET_QUIET, PRESET_LIVE, PRESET_VERBOSE","design":"Built-in preset definitions:

# audit.conf - Security auditing workflow
# Description: Full logging for security audits
json=true
log_dir=/tmp/rano-audit
no_dns=false
stats_interval_ms=0
show_ancestry=true

# quiet.conf - Minimal output
# Description: Summary only, no live output
summary_only=true
stats_interval_ms=0
no_banner=true

# live.conf - Real-time monitoring focus
# Description: Frequent stats, no SQLite overhead
stats_interval_ms=1000
stats_width=80
no_sqlite=true
stats_view=domain

# verbose.conf - Maximum detail
# Description: All information, all protocols
show_ancestry=true
include_udp=true
include_listening=true
stats_interval_ms=2000

Search order:
1. ~/.config/rano/presets/<name>.conf
2. /etc/rano/presets/<name>.conf (system-wide)
3. Built-in (compiled in)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:05:49.958498465Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T11:08:43.687648105Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T11:08:43.687607859Z","close_reason":"Implemented PresetLoader with 4 builtin presets (audit, quiet, live, verbose), load_preset(), list_presets(), apply_preset_values(), and CLI flags --preset/--list-presets. Presets merge in order (later wins). All 78 tests pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3t7","depends_on_id":"bd-26d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:05:49.987421243Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3t7","depends_on_id":"bd-db8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:02.835734189Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-52z","title":"Implement config validation logic","description":"Deliverables:
- ConfigValidator struct:
  - errors: Vec<ConfigError>
  - warnings: Vec<ConfigWarning>

- validate_config_file(path) -> ValidationResult:
  - Parse as key=value
  - Check each key against known_keys set
  - Validate value types per key
  - Compile patterns to catch regex errors

- validate_toml_config(path) -> ValidationResult:
  - Parse as TOML
  - Check [providers] section structure
  - Validate mode is 'merge' or 'replace'
  - Check pattern arrays are strings

- validate_paths(config) -> ValidationResult:
  - log_dir: directory exists or can be created
  - sqlite: parent directory exists
  - config files: exist if explicitly specified

- validate_patterns(config) -> ValidationResult:
  - Compile all pattern/exclude_pattern as regex/glob
  - Report syntax errors with pattern text

- ValidationResult:
  - is_valid: bool (no errors)
  - errors: Vec<(file, line, message)>
  - warnings: Vec<(file, line, message)>","design":"Known config keys (for typo detection):
# Process selection
pattern, exclude_pattern, pid, no_descendants

# Polling
interval_ms, once

# Output
json, summary_only, color, log_file, log_dir, log_format, no_color, no_banner, theme

# Domain resolution
no_dns, domain_mode, pcap, include_udp, no_udp, include_listening

# SQLite
sqlite, no_sqlite, db_batch_size, db_flush_ms, db_queue_max

# Stats
stats_interval_ms, stats_width, stats_top, stats_view, stats_cycle_ms

# Alerts (new)
alert_domain, alert_max_connections, alert_max_per_provider, alert_duration_ms, alert_unknown_domain, alert_bell, alert_cooldown_ms

# Presets (new)
preset

Value type validation:
- _ms, _size, _max, _top, _width: positive integer
- pattern, exclude_pattern: compilable regex/glob
- color, log_format, domain_mode, theme: enum values
- Boolean keys: true/false","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:21.748149071Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:23:51.994618802Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:23:51.994575240Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-52z","depends_on_id":"bd-n2d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:21.762516839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-90z","title":"Retry detection CLI and tests","description":"Deliverables:
- CLI flags: --retry-threshold <N>, --retry-window-ms <N>
- Config keys: retry_threshold, retry_window_ms
- Warning output format: '⚠ Retry pattern: N connections to IP:port in Xs'
- SQLite: add retry_count column to events (for close events)

- Unit tests:
  - test_retry_detection_triggers_at_threshold()
  - test_retry_detection_window_expiry()
  - test_retry_detection_per_endpoint()

- E2E test: simulate rapid reconnects, verify warnings","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:10:15.710962523Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:17:15.761860755Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:17:15.761801533Z","close_reason":"Implemented retry detection CLI and tests:
- Added CLI flags: --retry-threshold, --retry-window-ms
- Added config keys: retry_threshold, retry_window_ms
- Added retry_count column to SQLite events table
- Integrated RetryTracker into main loop with warning output
- Warning format: '⚠ Retry pattern: N connections to IP:port in Xs'
- Added 3 unit tests: threshold trigger, window expiry, per-endpoint tracking
All 113 tests pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-90z","depends_on_id":"bd-1i6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:10:15.753292539Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-90z","depends_on_id":"bd-3dy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:10:49.214275153Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
